Home / Compare / Bluekoff
specialty arabica single-origin Bangkok-based accessible

Bluekoff

บลูคอฟฟ์

4.3
★ ★ ★ ★ ☆
480 reviews
Origin Northern Thailand / Chiang Rai / Chiang Mai
Roast Levels light medium dark
Price Range ฿200–380 / 200g
Founded 2008
Formats ground, whole bean, drip bag

Bluekoff is a Bangkok-based specialty roaster and retailer that sources arabica from across northern Thailand's highlands. Known for consistent quality, accessibility, and a broad portfolio of single-origins and blends.

Official Website ↗

Flavor Profile

Clear and approachable specialty profile. Depending on the lot: sweet citrus, light brown sugar, and mild floral notes in lighter roasts. Darker roasts offer chocolate and nuts with low bitterness.

Tasting Notes

sweet citrus brown sugar floral chocolate nuts

Flavor Breakdown

Body
3/5
Acidity
3/5
Sweetness
3/5
Bitterness
2/5
Aroma
4/5
